changes: Fixed repeated macOS keychain permission prompts and device identity churn when a keychain prompt is denied
Fixed Memories failing to load ("data couldn't be read") for long-time users with legacy memory records
Updated notch chat agent controls so spawned subagents open from tool calls and settings moved to a hover-only right-side control.
Improved notch chat scrolling so streaming responses follow the bottom only until the user scrolls away
Improved desktop release checks so agent runtime packaging issues are caught before release
